## Summary

A clear and concise description of the feature you are proposing.

## Component

Which part of PIKKY does this relate to?

- [ ] Solana Program (on-chain)
- [ ] TypeScript SDK
- [ ] Python Agent / Trading Engine
- [ ] x402 Payment Flow
- [ ] MBTI Strategy Logic
- [ ] CLI
- [ ] New Component

## Motivation

Why is this feature needed? What problem does it solve?

## Proposed Solution

Describe the solution you have in mind.

### API / Interface Changes

```typescript
// Show proposed API changes if applicable
```

### Behavior Changes

Describe how the system behavior would change.

## Alternatives Considered

Describe any alternative solutions or features you have considered.

## Implementation Notes

Any technical details or constraints that should be considered:

- Impact on existing x402 payment flows
- Impact on MBTI strategy calculations
- On-chain program changes required
- SDK breaking changes
- Migration path for existing users
